name: sonarr
description: TV series manager for automated downloads and library organization

fields.name: SONARR_PORT
fields.label: App Port
fields.help: Port used to open Sonarr in your browser.

fields.name: SONARR_CONFIG_LOCATION
fields.label: Sonarr Config Folder
fields.help: Stores Sonarr configuration, database, and application state.

fields.name: DOWNLOADS_LOCATION
fields.label: Downloads Folder
fields.help: Folder where your download client saves completed and in-progress TV downloads.

fields.name: TV_LOCATION
fields.label: TV Library Folder
fields.help: Folder where Sonarr will organize and manage your TV library.

fields.name: PUID
fields.label: PUID
fields.help: User ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: PGID
fields.label: PGID
fields.help: Group ID used by the container for file permissions.

fields.name: TZ
fields.label: Timezone
fields.help:
Timezone used by Sonarr for scheduled tasks and logs.
Example: Asia/Dubai.

fields.name: RESTART_POLICY
fields.label: Restart Policy
fields.help: Controls whether the container restarts automatically.

fields.name: SONARR_NETWORK_MODE
fields.label: Network
fields.help: Choose Create New Bridge for the default Compose network, Host Mode for host networking, or an existing named Docker network.

fields.name: SONARR_IMAGE
fields.label: Image
fields.help:
Docker image used for Sonarr.
Change this only if you want a different tag or image source.

fields.name: SONARR_CONTAINER_NAME
fields.label: Container Name
fields.help: EasyDocker sets the container name from the project name.

ui.overview: Sonarr helps you track, download, and organize TV series automatically.
what_happens: A Sonarr container will be created
Your config, downloads, and TV library folders will be mounted into the container
You can keep the default bridge network or attach Sonarr to an existing network
ui.data_location: Relative paths are stored inside this app's project folder under the mounted EasyDocker base config path.
